name: C.R.I.T. plutonium engine
description: A small supplementary engine used on many C.R.I.T. vehicles.  Using a compact nuclear reactor, refined nuclear fuel is sealed within and configured to provide a constant mediocre yield of torque when properly installed.

name: C.R.I.T. hydrogen engine
description: While not the most powerful motor, this one works well for smaller C.R.I.T. vehicles which need a lightweight renewable power source, yet also a strong engine.
